evidence_requirements: final response conforms to expected output
name: general query kernel
postconditions: extracted: If relevant news results are found, they will be returned to the user.
extracted: If no relevant results are found due to rate limiting or lack of matches, an appropriate message will inform the user.
extracted: The generation process will report a completion score (in this case, 0.00).
preconditions: task belongs to family: general query
trace corresponds to a solved task
extracted: A query related to news must be specified.
extracted: The system must have access to a web search capability or news database.
extracted: Rate limits for the web search service must not be exceeded.
rollback: if evidence is insufficient, return to planning
if a tool returns contradictory data, invalidate kernel
if schema inference is unstable, demote kernel confidence
